name: Sediment Geochemical Measurements from GeoB16310-2 at Gulf of Mexico Site (March 2012)
description: A dataset containing sediment geochemical measurements including Total Organic Carbon (TOC) and Total Inorganic Carbon (TIC) recorded at varying sediment depths. The data originates from a single sampling event (GeoB16310-2) conducted on March 22, 2012, at a specific point location in the Gulf of Mexico (Latitude 23.82405, Longitude -87.17028) at an elevation of -565 meters.
